cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by previous response.

showDebugValues.description: When false (default), excludes MarketIncrease/Decrease/Swap OrderCreated debug events.

toTimestamp.description: Inclusive upper-bound timestamp filter. Accepts seconds or milliseconds.

fromTimestamp.description: Inclusive lower-bound timestamp filter. Accepts seconds or milliseconds.

forAllAccounts.description: When true, returns trades for all accounts.

address.description: Trader address. Required unless `forAllAccounts` is true.

Record_string._name-string--type-string_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Record_string.any_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

BigIntToString_StakingPowerData_.description:
Recursively converts bigint types to string types in a type definition.
Handles primitives, objects, arrays, and nested structures.
Preserves Date type as-is.

Pick_MarketInfoResponse.Exclude_keyofMar.description: From T, pick a set of properties whose keys are in the union K

Omit_MarketInfoResponse.Exclude_MarketVa.description: Construct a type with the properties of T except for those in type K.

Pick_MarketInfoResponse.MarketValuesFiel.description: From T, pick a set of properties whose keys are in the union K

innerData.description: Optional extra payload appended to the LayerZero compose message (hex).

nativeDropAmount.description: Optional native drop (gas) for the destination chain, in destination native decimals.

nativeFee.description: Optional; when omitted, server quotes Stargate `nativeFee` on the source chain.

composeGas.description: Optional client-supplied destination compose-gas hint; bypasses server quote.

destinationStargatePoolAddress.description: Optional override; otherwise resolved from the registry by symbol/token.

sourceStargatePoolAddress.description: Optional override; otherwise resolved from the registry by symbol/token.

tokenAddress.description: Token address on the settlement chain (alternative to `tokenSymbol`).

tokenSymbol.description:
Token identifier. Provide one of:
 - `tokenSymbol` (e.g. "USDC" | "USDT" | "ETH"), or
 - `tokenAddress` on the settlement chain.
Stargate pool addresses and source-side `isNativeOnSource` are resolved server-side.

amount.description: Amount in token-native decimals as a base-10 string.

account.description: GMX account that will receive the deposit on the settlement chain.

srcChainId.description: Source chain id (where the user holds funds and signs the bridge tx).

Record_string.unknown_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

requestId.description: Server-generated id; pass back to /submit and use for /status polling.

gasPaymentToken.description: Optional ERC-20 token to pay relayer fee in. Defaults to chain's gas-payment token.

requestId.description: Echo back the requestId from /prepare to link prepare→submit→status.

BigIntToString_BuybackWeeklyStatsData_.description:
Recursively converts bigint types to string types in a type definition.
Handles primitives, objects, arrays, and nested structures.
Preserves Date type as-is.

Record_string.ApyEntry_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

post.description:
Trade history search supporting the same filters used by the GMX UI:
marketsDirections (per-tuple market+direction+collateral) and
orderEventCombinations (orderType+eventName+isDepositOrWithdraw+isTwap).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid market addresses or symbols
Bad Request - Invalid address or spender
